title: Good side pressure creates impossible choices for the enemy team
body: Strong side pressure does not just hit a tower. It forces the enemy team into bad choices: send people to the side and lose control elsewhere, or ignore the side and lose wave, tower, tempo, or a vulnerable carry. The real win is the no-win decision tree you create.
actionables: Before hard committing to side pressure, identify which two bad responses you are creating for the enemy.
Use teleport, respawn timing, and visible enemy positions to make your side pressure costly to answer.
Review side lane wins by asking what impossible choice the enemy was forced into.

source.title: Jugar asi me convirtio en la mejor camille de europa (te enseno como lo hice)
source.notes: Derived from the repeated side-lane sequences where pressure forces defenders or loses Baron/Nash control.
